summary: Parallel review: FAIL (9 critical, 1 warning, 1 suggestion). Compound gate: WARN

findingsList.text: Verified the handshake claim: any 🔴 from any role in `build-verify` produces FAIL via existing `computeVerdict` behavior. No production code change required.
- `bin/lib/synthesize.mjs:18-32` — `parseFindings` picks up 🔴 regardless of role prefix
- `mergeReviewFindings` preserves the 🔴 emoji when inserting `[role]`/`[simplicity veto]`

🔵 .team/features/multi-perspective-code-review/tasks/task-3/artifacts/test-output.txt:1 — Stale artifact shows 591 tests; current state is 563 (the parameterized "any 🔴 from any role causes FAIL" suite no longer exists). Re-run `npm test > artifacts/test-output.txt` to align with the simplified v2 handshake.

Evidence: 563/563 tests pass per `task-3/artifacts/test-output.txt`; the three `mergeReviewFindings end-to-end verdict (build-verify semantics)` cases (any-role 🔴 → FAIL, all-clean → PASS, simplicity-only 🔴 → FAIL with veto tag) all green in the gate output. Spec is verifiable from acceptance criteria, scope is test-only, and the locked contract directly serves the multi-perspective review feature's safety guarantee.
- `test/flows.test.mjs:297-307` explicitly tests all 6 roles (architect, engineer, product, tester, security, simplicity) for per-role 🔴 → FAIL.

Test-only change in `test/flows.test.mjs:324-365` adding parametric per-role 🔴→FAIL coverage plus multi-critical and zero-critical cases. No production code touched — confirmed via `git show 464260a --stat` and `git show b0ff187 --stat`. Test inputs are hard-coded literals; no user input, auth, or secrets surface. Test output shows 563/563 pass, exit 0.

Task-3 is a verification-only handshake (commit 007bf11 touches only `handshake.json` — zero production code changed). The any-role-red→FAIL contract is enforced by the existing `computeVerdict` (bin/lib/synthesize.mjs:40) on output from `mergeReviewFindings`, with crashed reviewers becoming synthetic 🔴 via `bin/lib/parallel-reviews.mjs`. The "build-verify verdict — any 🔴 from any role causes FAIL" test suite covers all six roles, multi-role, and zero-red cases (test-output.txt lines 297-307; full suite 591/591 pass).
